arts.ttl: Milan and Inter Surpass Juventus in Revenue, but European Elite Remains Distant
arts.sum: In a historic shift, AC Milan and Inter Milan have overtaken Juventus in revenue for the first time since the 2011-12 season. This change comes in the same year that Real Madrid became the first football club to surpass €1 billion in revenue.
